raw_consumer_statement:
I made a purchase on XX/XX/XXXXXXXX The merchant messaged me at around XXXX that their truck broke down and that they were delivering later that night. I emailed them back that I was already in bed to deliver the next day. They responded and apologized for the delay. 

To my surprise, when I saw an email sent at around XXXX the next morning when I woke up letting me know that the items have been left at my door. There was nothing at my door when I looked at around XXXX. I immediately messaged the merchant. They did not respond. 

I filed a dispute with Sears XXXX. I followed up 30 days later, I was told that they were still working on it- to give it 60 - 90 days for resolution. I just logged into my account and noticed there was a letter dated XX/XX/XXXXXXXX  to let me know that they have closed my dispute because " I didn't respond to their inquiries ''. Which wasn't true. Nothing was sent to me. 
I reached out to them and I was rudely told that my dispute had been closed. This is not the first time they'll do this either. They're not very helpful when it comes to helping card holders.
